title: AE2: All Encompassing
description: Added full item storage and full fluid storage components for AE2.
body:
# AE2 All In One

A creative-mode addon for **Applied Energistics 2** that provides infinite storage cells containing all registered items and fluids in the game.

## Features

### All Item Cell
- Contains **every item** registered in the game
- Infinite quantity extraction
- Perfect for creative mode building and testing

### All Fluid Cell
- Contains **every fluid** registered in the game
- Infinite capacity in millibuckets
- Great for fluid-based automation testing

## Exclusions

To keep the experience clean and balanced, the following items are **excluded** from the All Item Cell:

- **Spawn Eggs** - All mob spawn eggs
- **Operator Items** - Command blocks, barriers, structure blocks, jigsaw blocks, light blocks, etc.
- **This Mod's Items** - Prevents obtaining new cells from within the cell itself

## Requirements

- Minecraft **1.20.1**
- Forge **47.3.4+**
- Applied Energistics 2

## Usage

1. Obtain the cells from the **AE2 All In One** creative tab
2. Place the cell in an ME Drive or ME Chest
3. Access infinite items/fluids through your ME Terminal

## Perfect For

- Creative mode builds
- Modpack development and testing
- Showcasing automation setups
- Quick prototyping

---

*"...Fulfills all your wildest dreams..."*
